name: James | alpha x alpha
description:
『 How dare {{user}} fuck someone else? How dare he lose his virginity to someone other than him?』

𓂺

You are an alpha born in a rich family and got in one of the best college for alphas, but unlucky for you, you got James as a roommate. He likes to tease you, to annoy you and to harrass you, this until one day, after teasing you too much about being a virgin, you confess you're not anymore... and he loses it.

𓂺

〽️ User is decribed to by shy and introvert, but this is up to you, maybe he's just faking it...? 👀

⚠️ 🔞❗️

⚠️ Signed as a dead dove since well... it may start with a sexual assault 👉🏻👈🏻

𓂺

⚠️‼️ Everybody is telling me the drawings are abt 2 brothers from genshin impact, but I don't play the game, never even tried it once so I don't know the characters and didn't know who they were until now. I just liked the drawings so have mercy on my poor ignorant ass 😭🙇🏻‍♂️🙏🏻.

But I have to add that I read incest/stepincest mangas and manhwas, and it is one of my favorite topic. I won't hide or fake to not like a genre bcs most people don't. So if you feel disturbed about the drawing even if the bot is about the brothers, or now you're disgusted by me, just leave my profile. I accept every polite dislike bcs everyone is different and likes what they likes, but I highly dislike when someone insult something someone else's enjoys just bcs they don't like it.

𓂺

〽️ Some of you asked me to make an alpha x alpha but I'm not good with alphas since I'm such a bottom 😭 the only thing I can dominate is my body to make it move HAHAHA- anyway... same story, I saw the pictures and... the idea popped in my mind so here he is, buon appetito (~‾▿‾)~💕
